payload.answer: I can’t inspect mem_123 from the provided input because no memory record, metadata, history, or store lookup result was included. I will not treat any fact from mem_123 as current unless its active, non-deleted, non-superseded contents are provided.

entity_resolution.reason: The request directly references a memory identifier, but no backing memory record was provided to resolve or inspect.

memory_cards.statement: Inspection requested for memory ID mem_123. No memory store contents or metadata were provided in the prompt, so the current fact, status, provenance, and deletion/supersession state of mem_123 cannot be determined from available input.

details: Received inspect request for memory ID mem_123.
No durable memory contents were available in the prompt.
No current facts were committed or asserted.

repair_options: Provide the stored record for mem_123, including statement/content, status, timestamps, provenance, and supersession/deletion metadata.
Run the inspect command against a connected memory backend and return the lookup result for explanation.
If mem_123 was deleted or superseded, include the replacement memory ID or tombstone metadata so it is not presented as current.
